mission.title: rook: ceph: add metrics for flexvolume driver
mission.description:
This allows to export persistent volume metrics.

**Description of your changes:**
According to https://github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes/issues/67400 in kubernetes 1.13 metrics support for flex volume was added.
I wonder, is adding support metrics flag enough to fix the issue?

**Which issue is resolved by this Pull Request:**

**Checklist:**

steps.title: Understand the problem
steps.description:
This allows to export persistent volume metrics.

**Description of your changes:**
According to https://github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes/issues/67400 in kubernetes 1.13 metrics support for flex volume

steps.title: Apply the configuration
steps.description:
Apply the following configuration to your cluster:
```yaml
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: test-pgsql
spec:
  serviceName: pgsql
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      name: test-pgsql
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        name: test-pgsql
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: postgres
        image: postgres:10
        lifecycle:
          preStop:
            exec:
              command: ["/etc/init.d/postgres", "stop"]
        ports:
        - containerPort: 5432
          name: 
```

steps.title: Review the fix
steps.description: The fix was implemented in https://github.com/kubestellar/console-kb/pull/6. Review the changes to understand the solution.

steps.title: Verify the fix
steps.description: Confirm that the issue is resolved in your environment by testing the affected functionality.

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: test-pgsql
spec:
  serviceName: pgsql
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      name: test-pgsql
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        name: test-pgsql
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: postgres
        image: postgres:10
        lifecycle:
          preStop:
            exec:
              command: ["/etc/init.d/postgres", "stop"]
        ports:
        - containerPort: 5432
          name: pgsql
          protocol: TCP
        volumeMounts:
        - mountPath: /var/lib/postgresql/data
          name: pgsql
          subPath: postgres
  volumeClaimTemplates:
  - metadata:
      name: pgsql
    spec:
      accessModes: 
        - ReadWriteOnce
      resources:
        requests:
          storage: 5Gi
      storageClassName: rook-ceph-block

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with rook installed or the issue environment reproducible.
